summary: Read-only plan classification for two hydrated open items. #92391 remains the live canonical issue. #92594 is a focused related candidate fix for #92391, but no merge, close, or fix action is planned because the job is plan-only, merge/fix are blocked, and the PR still needs maintainer compatibility review before any merge path.
